LanguageData.NapalmRefiner.label: Prometheum Refiner
LanguageData.NapalmRefiner.description: Processes chemfuel into prometheum, a military-grade incendiary agent which ignites on contact with oxygen. The raw resource is used to craft incendiary ammo of all kinds.
LanguageData.Filth_NapalmTrail.label: Chemfuel trail
LanguageData.NapalmBomb.label: Prometheum bomb
